concerns.text: Phase 7 tasks (T060-T074) are listed as [ ] (unchecked) while all other tasks are [X] (checked). This creates ambiguity about whether these tasks are required for feature completion or optional future work. Given the description of Phase 7 as addressing 'prior research-stage review concerns', these tasks should be considered mandatory and marked as [X].

Tasks T049 and T050 (enforcing the 6h/2CPU constraint) are placed in Phase 6 (Validation). This is too late. The constraint (FR-010) applies to the *entire* pipeline, meaning the constraint should be enforced during training (Phase 3/4) and not just at the validation stage. This could lead to wasted compute if the pipeline exceeds the limit during training.

Similar to T049/T050, T052 (enforcing 8GB memory footprint) is in Phase 6. This constraint (FR-013) also applies to the entire pipeline and should be enforced during training to prevent out-of-memory errors.

Task T032 references an arXiv paper (2305.18454) for validation (FR-011), but the spec states validation should be against the QM9 quantum calculation reference data. This discrepancy needs clarification.

Task T016 states 'MUST precede T017/T018 per spec computational efficiency requirement FR-010'. While correct, it would be clearer to explicitly state *why* T016 must precede T017/T018 (e.g., 'T016 creates the subset used as input for T017/T018').
